title: agropyron squarrosum
intro: Agropyron squarrosum, also known as squarrosum wheat grass or squarrosum grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Agropyron squarrosum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Agropyron squarrosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, with some also consuming it as a dietary supplement in the form of powder or capsules.
